summary: Iteration 66: Tested 3 new alarm pages (/seguridad-hogar-empresa, /alarmas/vivienda, /alarmas/negocio) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Navigation, CTAs, FAQ accordions, kit pricing, footer links all working correctly. No FloatingSOSButton on any page.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified all 3 new alarm pages: 1) /seguridad-hogar-empresa (Main alarm landing) - hero, choose-your-space cards, components showcase, 3 kit pricing cards (Essential 24.99, Premium 39.99, Business 54.99), vs-competition table, Sentinel section, plans comparison, 8-question FAQ, CTA. 2) /alarmas/vivienda (Home detail) - hero, 4 image + 4 icon equipment cards, full kit image, 2 plans (Essential + Premium), how-it-works, Sentinel integration, 6-question FAQ, CTA. 3) /alarmas/negocio (Business detail) - hero, 4 business type cards, equipment showcase with warehouse image, Business plan (54.99/69.99), Sentinel for business, 7-question FAQ, CTA. All navigation works correctly (header links, card links, Ver Sentinel button, all CTAs to /contacto). Footer updated with Alarmas Vivienda/Negocio links. NO FloatingSOSButton on any page. StockUrgencyPopup appears after ~8 seconds on session start.
